_note: gem -> primary attribute, used ONLY to compute socket colour (str=red, dex=green, int=blue). Partial by design: covers the example profile's gems; unknown gems render neutral so a partial list still works. Full per-gem data (incl. quest/vendor availability per class) is P5. Attributes should be spot-checked against the game — a wrong attr shows a wrong socket colour. Match is case-insensitive and ignores a trailing ' Support'.
